name: Owner Status Update
description: Operations coordinates an owner-facing status snapshot from active run state, blockers, and needed decisions.

stages.name: Gather Owner Context
stages.description: Pull active runs and current blockers for an owner or portfolio slice.

steps.title: Gather owner run state
steps.instructions: Gather active runs, blockers, approvals, and recent completions for the owner portfolio slice.
steps.dispatch_body: Gather active workflow state and blockers for owner status update.

steps.title: Gather lane summaries
steps.instructions: Gather Pulse lane summaries relevant to the owner scope. Use honest unavailable states for missing data.
steps.dispatch_body: Gather owner-scoped Pulse lane summaries and unavailable-data notes.

stages.name: Draft Status Snapshot
stages.description: Draft the owner-facing summary with what is done, stuck, and needed.

steps.title: Draft owner status update
steps.instructions: Draft a concise status update: done, in progress, blocked, and needed from owner. No fabricated completion claims.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft owner-facing status update from workflow and Pulse state.

steps.title: Review owner status update
steps.instructions: Review the draft for accuracy, tone, and any sensitive details before release.
steps.human_prompt: Review owner status update before any owner-facing release.

stages.name: Stage Owner View
stages.description: Stage the owner projection and track follow-up decisions.

steps.title: Stage owner projection
steps.instructions: Stage the approved status update for the owner projection or tokenized status page.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved owner status projection for cockpit review.

steps.title: Track owner follow-ups
steps.instructions: Track owner decisions, questions, and follow-up blockers created by the status update.
steps.dispatch_body: Track owner follow-up actions from the staged status update.
